facebook.caption: POV: you ditched the resort strip and found Phu Quoc Centre on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Local market energy. Real prices. No performance for tourists. This is where the island actually shops. 4.3 stars across 162 reviews says you won't regret the detour. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
